mainEntity.name: What benefits does Utah workers' comp provide for asthma worsened by workplace irritants in Sandy?
mainEntity.text: What benefits does Utah workers' comp provide for asthma worsened by workplace irritants in Sandy?

acceptedAnswer.text: Utah workers' comp covers medical treatment, temporary total disability (66⅔% wages up to 312 weeks), permanent partial impairment awards based on AMA Guides, and vocational rehab for asthma aggravated by workplace irritants.

suggestedAnswer.text: For Sandy warehouse or salon workers, benefits include inhalers, oxygen therapy, lost wages during flares, and lump-sum PPI for lung function loss. File Form 100 within deadlines; disputes go to administrative law judge. Insurers often deny aggravation claims—use pre/post-exposure PFTs. Permanent restrictions may qualify for retraining.

name: Workers' Comp Benefits for Work-Aggravated Asthma in Sandy
